audit_items.proof_trace: Lines 350-356 enforce a strict if/else: when `asset == s_assetOut`, the contract calls `safeTransfer(s_assetOutReceiver, balance)` and the `else` branch (which sets `s_auctionStarts` and calls `_onAuctionStart`) is never reached. The only write to `s_auctionStarts` in the entire codebase is inside that `else` arm (L353), so `s_auctionStarts[assetOut]` can never be non-zero. `s_assetOut` cannot change mid-execution because `setAssetOut` requires `ASSET_ADMIN_ROLE` and `_whenNoLiveAuctions()` reverts if any auction is live.
